tasks.title: Sync .env and .env.example with config env vars
evidence: internal/config/config.go loads PROXY_URL/PROXY_USERNAME/PROXY_PASSWORD/PROXY_POOL_FILE, WEBHOOK_*, MAX_BATCH_SIZE, RESPECT_ROBOTS_TXT, RETENTION_* but .env/.env.example stop at API_AUTH_ENABLED and omit these entries.
plan: Inventory all env vars consumed in config.Load().
Add missing entries and comments to .env and .env.example (no real secrets).
Keep ordering/grouping aligned with config sections and verify defaults.

tasks.title: Implement TransformPreview apply path in ResultsExplorer
evidence: web/src/components/ResultsExplorer.tsx onApply for TransformPreview only logs and contains TODO: Apply transformation to export.
plan: Define expected behavior for applying transforms (state update vs export pipeline).
Wire onApply to the transform API or client-side transformation logic.
Update export flow to use transformed output and handle errors.
Add web tests covering apply success and failure paths.
